enable_ticket_notify.label: Enable Ticket Notifications
enable_ticket_notify.description: Whether to enable Telegram notifications for ticket creation and replies

enable_payment_notify.label: Enable Payment Notifications
enable_payment_notify.description: Whether to enable Telegram notifications for successful payments

start_welcome_title.default: 🎉 Welcome to the XBoard Telegram Bot!
start_welcome_title.label: Welcome Title
start_welcome_title.description: Welcome title displayed by the /start command

start_bot_description.default:
🤖 I am your personal assistant, here to help you: 
• Bind your XBoard account
• Check traffic usage
• Get the latest subscription link
• Manage account binding status
start_bot_description.label: Bot Description
start_bot_description.description: Introduction of bot functions displayed by the /start command

start_bind_guide.default:
🔗 Please bind your XBoard account first:
1. Log in to your XBoard account
2. Copy your subscription link
3. Send /bind + subscription link
start_bind_guide.label: Binding Instructions
start_bind_guide.description: Text for unbound users showing binding instructions

start_unbind_guide.default:
📋 Available Commands: 
/traffic - Check traffic usage
/getlatesturl - Get the latest link
/unbind - Unbind account
start_unbind_guide.label: Command List for Bound Users
start_unbind_guide.description: Command list displayed by bound users

start_bind_commands.label: Command List for Unbound Users
start_bind_commands.description: Command list displayed by unbound users

start_footer.default: 💡 Tip: All commands need to be used in private chat
start_footer.label: Bottom Prompt
start_footer.description: Prompt information at the bottom of the /start command

help_text.default:
Please use the following commands:
/bind - Bind account
/traffic - Check traffic
/getlatesturl - Get latest link
help_text.label: Help text
help_text.description: Displayed help text when an unknown command is entered
